confirmation.detail: inbox envelope env_326f1616-a460-49cc-90ad-6a6a4fefaef6 read back as received

evidence: materialized message was from staccato.narada@global-maxima.com to willem.driessen@staccato2011.com and sourced from sentitems
proposal: Add canonical operation-intake source/direction/principal boundary: exclude self-authored sent/outbound artifacts from fresh work by default, while keeping them available for reconciliation and audit evidence; allow explicit override.
payload.recommendation: Promote to Narada proper implementation task.
payload.summary: Staccato observed an operation-intake false positive: its own sent clarification reply from sentitems was routed into staccato-email-marketing as fresh work, producing a retryable clarification_needed item with no proposed action. Sent outbound artifacts should remain reconciliation evidence but not become inbound work by default.
payload.title: Prevent operation intake from re-admitting own outbound artifacts
